name: PAY_TASKS_VL
query: SELECT b.TASK_ID, b.BASE_TASK_ID, b.BASE_TASK_NAME, b.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, b.TASK_TYPE, b.MODULE_ID, b.DEF_CATEGORY_TYPE, b.DEF_SUB_CATEGORY_TYPE, b.DEFAULT_CHECKLIST_NAME, b.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, b.LEGISLATION_CODE, b.ENTERPRISE_ID, b.NAME_SPACE, b.DEST_UI_URL, b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATED_BY, b.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, b.CREATED_BY, b.CREATION_DATE, b.AUTOMATIC_FLAG, b.ACTION_FREEZE_FLAG, tl.TASK_NAME, tl.DESCRIPTION, b.start_sch_time_def_id , b.start_sch_formula_id, b.SUBMITTING_USER_FLAG, b.ESS_REQUEST_CATEGORY, b.HIDE_INCOMPLT_ACTION_FLAG FROM PAY_TASKS b, PAY_TASKS_TL tl WHERE b.TASK_ID = tl.TASK_ID AND USERENV('LANG') = tl.LANGUAGE
